# Shop CMS — LLM / AI agent context
# https://bilohash.com/shop/

> Shop CMS v1.1.1 — PHP e-commerce platform. Light-themed product catalog, session cart, demo checkout (Stripe, PayPal, Vipps, cash on delivery), categories admin and multilingual SEO.

## Product
- Name: Shop CMS
- Version: 1.1.1 (2026-07-06)
- Type: PHP e-commerce script (no framework)
- Languages demo: Norwegian (default), English, Swedish, Ukrainian, Russian
- Languages product site: NO, EN, UK, RU, SV, LT
- Contact: https://bilohash.com/shop/contact.php

## URLs
- Live demo: https://bilohash.com/shop/
- Product site: https://bilohash.com/shop/site/
- Order development: https://bilohash.com/shop/site/order.php
- Checkout (demo): https://bilohash.com/shop/checkout.php
- Admin: https://bilohash.com/shop/admin/ (demo / demo2026)
- Sitemap index: https://bilohash.com/shop/sitemap.xml (pages, products, categories, verticals + hreflang)

## SEO & structured data
- Schema.org: SoftwareApplication, Product, WebPage, Organization, ProfessionalService
- Open Graph, Twitter Cards, canonical, hreflang (6 langs on product site)
- llms.txt, dynamic sitemap with products and verticals

## Payments (admin → Payments)
- Stripe, PayPal, Vipps — API keys in data/settings.json
- COD (cash on delivery / postoppkrav / накладений платіж) — no API, instructions at checkout

## Tech
- PHP 8+, JSON products/categories, session cart, modular i18n
- Admin: categories CRUD, appearance, payments, reCAPTCHA, AI chat
- Handoff docs: /shop/prompt/

## Related Bilohash products
- Booking CMS: https://bilohash.com/booking/
- Auction CMS: https://bilohash.com/auction/
- Freelance CMS: https://bilohash.com/freelance/
- AI Platform: https://bilohash.com/ai/

## Root
- https://bilohash.com/llms.txt
